---
title: "First Quarto Document and Post"
author: "Hyun Joon"
date: "2026-05-02"
categories: []
format: html
---
# Introduction
This is a simple document(and webpage) created with *Quarto*.  
First a mandatory hello world.

Hello, World!

I have absolutely nothing to write here...

## Subsection 
This is a subsection.  
Pretty bland, if you ask me. 

# Section 1
This is section 1.  
Pretty unremarkable, if you ask me.

# Section 2
Mathematical expressions.
Finally something significant.  
Here is the famous Euler product formula.
$$\zeta(s) = \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} \frac{1}{n^s} = \prod_{p} \frac{1}{1 - p^{-s}}$$
